title: Responses, Problem Details, Streaming, and Protocol-Aware Output · Go Semantics Case: Problem Details Rfc9457
summary: A service writes bodies before status and headers, exposes stack traces, treats cancellation as 500, flushes unbounded streams, and assumes optional ResponseWriter interfaces always exist.
